name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, delayed fraud detection causes financial losses. We provide automated fraud flagging instead of manual review of claims data.
problem_solved: Identifying potential fraud in insurance claims
